name_ar: Saudi Outdoor Lifestyle — Heritage Setting — S10
purpose: Saudi subject in heritage outdoor setting (Diriyah, AlUla, Najdi architecture, palm groves). Cultural pride.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Cinematic authentic photograph of a Saudi {subject} in their early thirties standing in traditional Najdi heritage setting with mudbrick architecture or palm grove visible in background suggesting Diriyah or Najd region at golden hour just before sunset, {dress_specification}, holding or interacting with {brand_product} naturally, warm directional golden-hour light from low angle casting long shadows, real skin texture with natural complexion showing slight desert tan, candid contemplative expression looking off-frame, authentic cultural setting non-staged composition, hyper-realistic textures on traditional architecture and natural Saudi landscape elements, shot on 50mm at f/2.8 with soft bokeh in background, no tourist framing {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: tourist photograph aesthetic
Avoid in output: model fashion shoot
Avoid in output: AI face failures
Never present non-Saudi talent or generic Middle-Eastern look — Saudi specificity is the point
Avoid tourist-photography aesthetic; this is lived-in lifestyle, not destination shoot
notes: Intents: launch, defend. Source code in research corpus: S10. Saudi adaptation guidance: Most culturally weighted UGC chain. Heritage settings (Najdi mudbrick from Diriyah, AlUla sandstone, palm groves of Al-Ahsa) signal authentic Saudi-ness. Critical: Najdi architecture is mudbrick with distinct geometric patterns and triangular details, NOT Egyptian sandstone, NOT Moroccan zellige, NOT Levantine arches. Auto-triggers during National Day (Sep 23) and Founding Day (Feb 22). Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month, daily during national occasions. Compliance level: elevated.
